title: Route boot/hot-restart output into guaranteed fresh auto chat sessions
summary: Fixes startup visibility by creating dedicated auto sessions for BOOT.md and hot-restart notifications, and wiring the frontend to always surface them as unread chats. Also removes duplicate auto-session creation path for scheduled task completions.
details:
## Why this change
Right now startup messages are easy to miss because they are written into existing/fixed sessions instead of guaranteed fresh auto chats.

Source evidence:
- `src/gateway/boot.ts` writes both normal boot and hot-restart output to fixed session IDs (`boot-startup` or `previousSessionId`) via `handleChat(..., sessionId)` and `addMessage(sessionId, ...)` (around lines 125-139 and 185-202).
- `src/gateway/lifecycle.ts` consumes restart notification with `sessionId = previousSessionId || 'default'` (around lines 114-118), which targets prior chat, not fresh auto chat.
- `src/gateway/core/server.ts` emits WS event `session_notification` for pending restart notices (around lines 49-58), but frontend has no handler for `session_notification`.
- `web-ui/src/pages/ChatPage.js` handles `boot_greeting` only when active session is empty (around lines 2714-2722), so it does not create/open a fresh auto chat.
- `src/gateway/scheduling/cron-scheduler.ts` already creates canonical auto sessions `auto_${job.id}_${Date.now()}` on job output (around lines 749-768), and broadcasts them via `task_done.automatedSession`.
- `web-ui/src/pages/TasksPage.js` independently creates another auto session on `task_complete` for cron tasks (around lines 925-951), causing duplicate/competing auto-session behavior.

## Exact source edits
- `src/gateway/boot.ts`
  - Add helper to generate startup auto session IDs/titles, e.g. `auto_boot_<ts>` and `auto_restart_<reason>_<ts>`.
  - Change `runBootMd()` flow so both hot-restart and full BOOT.md runs execute and persist to a fresh auto session (not `boot-startup`/previous chat).
  - Return structured metadata with `sessionId`, `title`, `source` so caller can broadcast deterministically.
- `src/gateway/chat/chat-helpers.ts`
  - In `gateway:startup` hook callback, after `runBootMd(...)` returns, broadcast a session event containing fresh auto session payload (`id/title/history/automated/unread`) instead of relying on active-session mutation via `boot_greeting`.
  - Keep existing behavior as backward-safe fallback during rollout, but make new session event canonical.
- `src/gateway/lifecycle.ts`
  - Update `consumePendingRestartNotification()` to return a restart notification payload that targets a fresh auto restart session ID rather than `previousSessionId/default`.
  - Keep `previousSessionId` in payload metadata for traceability only.
- `src/gateway/core/server.ts`
  - Extend WS payload for restart startup to include an `automatedSession` object (same shape as schedule auto sessions) under `session_notification`, with deterministic ID/title/history.
- `web-ui/src/ws.js`
  - No protocol changes required; event bus already dispatches arbitrary event types.
- `web-ui/src/pages/ChatPage.js`
  - Add `wsEventBus.on('session_notification', ...)` handler:
    - If payload includes `automatedSession`, call `upsertAutomatedSession(..., { markUnread: true })`.
    - Show toast and do not depend on currently active chat.
  - Update `boot_greeting` handler to avoid mutating only active empty session; prefer auto session insertion path.
- `web-ui/src/pages/TasksPage.js`
  - Remove/disable manual cron auto-session creation block in `task_complete` handler (lines around 928-951).
  - Treat backend `task_done.automatedSession` as the single source of truth for scheduled-run auto chats.

## Deterministic behavior after patch
- Every gateway boot (BOOT.md summary) appears in a brand-new unread auto chat session.
- Every hot restart completion message appears in a brand-new unread auto chat session.
- Startup visibility is independent of currently active chat.
- Scheduled task completion creates exactly one canonical auto session (from backend `task_done.automatedSession`), with no frontend duplicate creation race.
- Existing regular chat sessions remain unchanged.

## Acceptance tests
1. Build:
   - Run `npm run build` with no TypeScript errors.
2. Cold startup visibility:
   - Restart gateway normally.
   - Verify sidebar gets a new unread auto chat (boot title), containing BOOT summary text.
   - Verify message is visible even when another chat was active before restart.
3. Hot restart visibility:
   - Trigger `gateway_restart` from a proposal flow.
   - On reconnect, verify a new unread auto restart session appears with restart completion content.
4. Cron completion single-session test:
   - Run a schedule that emits non-HEARTBEAT_OK output.
   - Verify exactly one new auto chat appears for that run.
   - Confirm no second duplicate session appears from TasksPage fallback logic.
5. Regression checks:
   - Regular interactive chats still append to their own sessions.
   - `task_notification` flows still append to existing task session when session exists.

## Risks and compatibility
- Risk: changing startup routing could affect components expecting `boot-startup` fixed ID.
  - Mitigation: preserve fallback event fields (`sessionId`, `text`) while introducing canonical `automatedSession` payload.
- Risk: duplicate handling if both `boot_greeting` and `session_notification` insert sessions.
  - Mitigation: dedupe by session ID in `upsertAutomatedSession` and suppress old mutation path once new path is active.
- Compatibility: no API contract break for existing consumers; event payload is additive and backward-safe.

affectedFiles.description: Generate and persist startup output into fresh auto sessions instead of fixed session IDs
Broadcast startup auto-session payload after BOOT.md run
Route pending restart notification to fresh auto restart session metadata
Emit session_notification with automatedSession payload for restart startup notice
Handle session_notification and insert unread automated sessions in sidebar
Remove duplicate frontend auto-session creation on task_complete for cron tasks

estimatedImpact: Startup and hot-restart messages become reliably visible in fresh unread chats; removes duplicate cron result sessions and aligns all auto-session creation paths.
executorPrompt:
Apply the approved patch exactly as specified.

Execution requirements:
1) Edit only the listed files:
- src/gateway/boot.ts
- src/gateway/chat/chat-helpers.ts
- src/gateway/lifecycle.ts
- src/gateway/core/server.ts
- web-ui/src/pages/ChatPage.js
- web-ui/src/pages/TasksPage.js
2) Implement deterministic fresh auto-session routing for BOOT.md and hot-restart output.
3) Add frontend handling for session_notification automated sessions and mark them unread.
4) Remove duplicate cron auto-session creation fallback in TasksPage task_complete handler.
5) Preserve backward-compatible payload fields where possible.
6) Run npm run build and stop if build fails.
7) Return a concise execution report with:
   - exact files changed
   - key behavioral differences now
   - build result output (pass/fail)
   - any blockers or deviations.
